name: DenialGPT
description: Denial Prevention and Gap Analysis Agent for hospital revenue cycle teams. Stops claim denials before they happen and tells you exactly whether an appeal will succeed — before you write a word.

tools.name: analyze_denial
tools.description: Classifies a claim denial, extracts CARC codes, identifies required evidence, calculates appeal deadline, and diagnoses root cause in the billing workflow.

denial_text.description: Raw denial letter text or serialized FHIR ExplanationOfBenefit JSON

tools.name: fetch_clinical_evidence
tools.description: Queries the FHIR sandbox for patient clinical records relevant to the denial type. Uses SHARP headers for authenticated access.

patient_id.description: FHIR Patient ID — injected automatically from X-Patient-ID header

tools.name: gap_analysis
tools.description: Compares payer requirements against patient FHIR clinical evidence. Returns appeal viability verdict (STRONG / WEAK / DO NOT APPEAL) with chain-of-thought reasoning.
